reasoning: Koren, today's session targets your lactate clearance limiter. Your last ride indicated improved aerobic endurance, but we need to directly challenge your ability to clear lactate to ensure you hit a sustained power output on key climbs like the Alpine Loop. By incorporating over-unders, you'll build the necessary fatigue resistance and improve your aerobic base.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 3x (10 min @ 218W, 5 min @ 245W), short rest between sets

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
